ru.title: Тест личности: Олимп
ru.start_subtitle: Оракул Олимпа готов открыть твой внутренний пантеон.
ru.review_subtitle: Выберите вопрос, чтобы ответить или изменить ответ.
ru.archetype_hint: Нажмите на имя архетипа, чтобы увидеть краткое описание.

en.title: Personality Test: Olympus
en.start_subtitle: The Oracle of Olympus is ready to reveal your inner pantheon.
en.review_subtitle: Pick a question to answer it or change your choice.
en.archetype_hint: Click an archetype name to open a short description.

lv.title: Personības tests: Olimps
lv.start_subtitle: Olimpa orākuls ir gatavs atklāt tavu iekšējo panteonu.
lv.review_subtitle: Izvēlies jautājumu, lai atbildētu vai mainītu atbildi.
lv.archetype_hint: Nospied uz arhetipa vārda, lai redzētu īsu aprakstu.

en.council: Your Council is formed by {archetype_2.name} and {archetype_3.name}. They shape your interaction with the world.
en.hero: Your heroic path is led by {hero.name}.
en.shadow_excess: In excess, {top_archetype.name} turns into {shadow}. This is the distortion point of your strength.
en.shadow_deficit: {archetype.name} is barely expressed in your system. This creates blind spots in your perception of the world.

lv.council: Tavu padomi veido {archetype_2.name} un {archetype_3.name}. Viņi nosaka tavu mijiedarbību ar pasauli.
lv.shadow_excess: Pārspīlējumā {top_archetype.name} pārvēršas par {shadow}. Tas ir tavas spēka izkropļojuma punkts.
lv.shadow_deficit: {archetype.name} tavā sistēmā gandrīz neizpaužas. Tas rada aklās zonas pasaules uztverē.

storm_poseidon.text: Your ship is caught in a storm. The wind tears the sails, and the crew is losing control. What do you do?

answers.A: Take the helm and give clear commands
answers.B: Try to understand the storm's pattern and behavior
answers.C: Climb the rigging and act first
answers.E: Observe and analyze

gift_hermes.text: At a crossroads, Hermes is waiting for you. He offers one gift, and you can choose only one. What do you choose?

answers.A: Power to influence other people's decisions
answers.B: Understanding the hidden causes of things
answers.C: Freedom to go anywhere and change your path at any moment
answers.E: The ability to see the future

cave_hades.text: You enter the underworld. Before you is knowledge that can change your life, but the price may be high. What do you choose?

answers.A: Learn the truth at any cost
answers.B: Do not enter, not every truth is needed
answers.C: Try to get the knowledge by indirect means
answers.E: First find out who created this trial and why

judgement_athena.text: The city is split in two. Each side is sure it is right. You are asked to decide. What do you rely on?

answers.A: Law. The rule must be the same for everyone
answers.C: Benefit for the future, what it will lead to
answers.D: Peace between people, don't destroy relationships
answers.E: Everyone's right to walk their own path

sirens_temptation.text: The Sirens offer you knowledge, power, and wish fulfillment. But in return you must give up one part of yourself. What will you give up?

answers.E: Knowledge

forge_hephaestus.text: Hephaestus offers you to forge a weapon or tool that will make you one of the most influential people of the era. But no one may know it was you. What do you answer?

answers.D: Ask who this will truly help
answers.E: Ask what price will have to be paid

apple_discord.text: A golden apple falls on the table. It says: 'to the worthiest'. Tension rises in the room, everyone feels it is about them. What do you do?

answers.B: Give it to the one who seems most worthy
answers.E: Ask who decided it must belong to anyone

voice_cassandra.text: You know for sure that a serious disaster is coming, but no one believes you. What do you do?

answers.C: Use any means to make people hear me
answers.D: Accept that no one will listen
answers.E: Try to understand why people cannot hear it

flight_icarus.text: You are given a chance to go beyond the familiar world. The opportunity is huge, but so is the risk. What do you choose?

answers.B: Prepare as much as possible first
answers.D: Try to delegate or send someone else
answers.E: Find a third way, neither risk nor refusal

return_odysseus.text: You return home after a long journey. Everything familiar seems changed. Ahead is one more choice: stay safe or go further for knowledge that may change everything. What do you choose?

answers.A: Home, I return to family and familiar life
answers.B: The mystery, I continue the journey into the unknown
answers.E: First see who exactly is waiting at home

throne_olympus.text: The gods offer you a place among them. It means power, influence, and responsibility. What is your first thought?

answers.A: At last, I can change the world
answers.C: Will I be able to keep my freedom?
answers.D: What will happen to people if I accept?
answers.E: Why me?

choice_fate.text: The three Moirai offer you threads of fate. You can choose only one, and there is no way back. What do you choose?

answers.E: Great understanding

labyrinth_daedalus.text: You are inside a labyrinth built by a great master. There is an exit, but the structure is complex and changing. What do you do?

answers.A: Study the labyrinth structure and rules
answers.B: Look for weak points and detours
answers.C: Try to understand the creator's intent
answers.D: Use everything around as a tool on the go
answers.E: Stop and ask why to seek an exit at all

underworld_silence.text: You are in Hades' realm. You receive knowledge that explains much about your life and people around you, but this truth is hard to live with. What do you do?

answers.D: Try to change events using it
answers.E: Study the consequences of this truth becoming known

argonauts_campaign.text: You lead an important joint expedition. The team is strong, but everyone has their own opinion and disputes begin. How do you act?

answers.B: Gather a council and hear everyone out
answers.D: Remind everyone of the main goal
answers.E: Strictly demand discipline

song_orpheus.text: You must influence a person who is closed off and does not hear you. Direct words do not work. How do you act?

answers.A: Tell a story or create an image that touches them
answers.C: Understand their pain and state, then start dialogue
answers.D: Create an atmosphere of beauty and meaning around them
answers.E: Step back and do not interfere

fire_prometheus.text: You are given great knowledge that can change society. But there is a risk: people may use it differently than you expect. What do you do?

answers.C: Keep the knowledge for the chosen few
answers.E: Ask whether people are ready for such knowledge

wings_icarus.text: You get a chance to go beyond the known world and try what no one has done before. But there is no guarantee you return the same. What do you choose?

answers.D: Take companions or delegate the risk
answers.E: Invent another way, less risky but still innovative

shadow_achilles.text: You are publicly underestimated and humiliated. How do you react?

answers.B: Wait for the right moment and respond later
answers.C: Outperform the offender through action, not words
answers.E: Pretend it does not matter

last_choice_moirai.text: The three Moirai stand before you and ask what people should remember about you in a thousand years.

answers.B: I understood the world and how it works
answers.C: I loved and was truly close to people
answers.D: I was free and nothing limited my path
answers.E: I lived my destiny and saw deep meaning in what happened

storm_poseidon.text: Tavs kuģis nonācis vētrā. Vējš plēš buras, komanda zaudē kontroli. Ko tu dari?

answers.A: Pārņemu stūri un dodu skaidras komandas
answers.B: Mēģinu saprast vētras likumsakarības un uzvedību
answers.E: Vēroju un analizēju

gift_hermes.text: Ceļu krustojumā tevi gaida Hērmess. Viņš piedāvā vienu dāvanu, un izvēlēties var tikai vienu. Ko tu izvēlies?

answers.C: Brīvību iet jebkur un jebkurā brīdī mainīt ceļu
answers.E: Spēju redzēt nākotni

cave_hades.text: Tu ieej pazemes valstībā. Tavā priekšā ir zināšanas, kas var mainīt tavu dzīvi, bet cena var būt augsta. Ko tu izvēlies?

answers.B: Neiet iekšā, ne katra patiesība ir vajadzīga
answers.D: Ņemt līdzi sabiedrotos un iet kopā
answers.E: Vispirms noskaidrot, kas un kāpēc šo pārbaudījumu radīja

judgement_athena.text: Pilsēta sadalījusies divās pusēs. Katra ir pārliecināta par savu taisnību. Tevi lūdz pieņemt lēmumu. Uz ko tu balsties?

answers.C: Ieguvums nākotnē, pie kā tas novedīs
answers.D: Miers starp cilvēkiem, galvenais nesagraut attiecības
answers.E: Ikviena tiesības iet savu ceļu

sirens_temptation.text: Sirēnas piedāvā tev zināšanas, spēku un vēlmju piepildījumu. Pretī jāatsakās no vienas savas daļas. No kā tu atteiksies?

answers.E: No zināšanām

forge_hephaestus.text: Hēfaists piedāvā izveidot ieroci vai rīku, kas tevi padarīs par vienu no ietekmīgākajiem cilvēkiem laikmetā. Nosacījums: neviens nedrīkst zināt, ka tas biji tu. Ko atbildi?

answers.E: Jautāju, kāda būs cena

apple_discord.text: Uz galda nokrīt zelta ābols ar uzrakstu: 'viscienīgākajam'. Telpā rodas spriedze, katrs jūt, ka tas ir par viņu. Ko tu dari?

answers.E: Jautāju, kas vispār nolēma, ka tam jābūt kādam

voice_cassandra.text: Tu droši zini, ka tuvākajā laikā notiks nopietna nelaime, bet tev netic. Ko tu dari?

answers.C: Izmantoju visus līdzekļus, lai mani sadzirdētu
answers.E: Mēģinu saprast, kāpēc cilvēki to nespēj sadzirdēt

flight_icarus.text: Tev dod iespēju iziet ārpus ierastās pasaules. Iespēja ir milzīga, bet risks arī. Ko tu izvēlies?

answers.E: Atrast trešo ceļu, ne risku un ne atteikšanos

return_odysseus.text: Tu atgriezies mājās pēc gara ceļa. Viss pazīstamais šķiet mainījies. Priekšā vēl viena izvēle: palikt drošībā vai iet tālāk pēc zināšanām, kas var visu mainīt. Ko tu izvēlies?

answers.A: Mājas, atgriežos pie ģimenes un ierastās dzīves
answers.E: Vispirms skatos, kurš tieši gaida mājās

throne_olympus.text: Dievi piedāvā tev vietu viņu vidū. Tā ir vara, ietekme un atbildība. Kāda ir tava pirmā doma?

answers.D: Kas notiks ar cilvēkiem, ja pieņemšu?
answers.E: Kāpēc tieši es?

choice_fate.text: Trīs Moiras sniedz tev likteņa pavedienus. Izvēlēties var tikai vienu, atpakaļceļa nebūs. Ko izvēlies?

answers.E: Lielu izpratni

labyrinth_daedalus.text: Tu esi labirintā, ko radījis liels meistars. Izeja ir, bet struktūra ir sarežģīta un mainīga. Ko tu dari?

answers.D: Izmantoju visu apkārtējo kā rīku uz vietas
answers.E: Apstājos un jautāju, kāpēc vispār meklēt izeju

underworld_silence.text: Tu esi Aīda valstībā. Tur atklājas zināšanas, kas daudz ko izskaidro tavā dzīvē un cilvēkos apkārt. Bet ar šo patiesību ir grūti dzīvot. Ko tu dari?

answers.D: Mēģinu ar tām mainīt notikumu gaitu
answers.E: Pētu sekas tam, ka šī patiesība kļūst zināma

argonauts_campaign.text: Tu vadi svarīgu kopīgu gājienu. Komanda ir spēcīga, bet katram ir savs viedoklis un sākas strīdi. Kā tu rīkojies?

answers.E: Stingri pieprasu disciplīnu

song_orpheus.text: Tev jāietekmē cilvēks, kurš ir noslēgts un tevi nedzird. Tieši vārdi nestrādā. Kā tu rīkojies?

answers.A: Pastāstu stāstu vai radu tēlu, kas viņu aizkustinās
answers.C: Saproti viņa sāpes un stāvokli, un no tā sāc dialogu
answers.D: Radu ap viņu skaistuma un jēgas atmosfēru
answers.E: Atkāpjos un neiejaucos

fire_prometheus.text: Tev atklātas lielas zināšanas, kas var mainīt sabiedrību. Bet ir risks: cilvēki var tās izmantot ne tā, kā tu gaidi. Ko tu dari?

answers.E: Jautāju, vai cilvēki ir gatavi šādām zināšanām

wings_icarus.text: Tev paveras iespēja iziet ārpus zināmās pasaules un izmēģināt to, ko vēl neviens nav darījis. Bet nav garantijas, ka atgriezīsies tāds pats. Ko izvēlies?

answers.D: Paņemu līdzgaitniekus vai deleģēju risku citiem
answers.E: Izdomāju citu veidu, mazāk bīstamu, bet joprojām inovatīvu

shadow_achilles.text: Tevi publiski nenovērtēja un pazemoja. Kā tu reaģē?

answers.C: Pārspēju aizvainotāju ar darbiem, ne vārdiem
answers.E: Izliekos, ka tam nav nozīmes

last_choice_moirai.text: Trīs Moiras stāv tavā priekšā un piedāvā izvēlēties, ko par tevi atcerēsies pēc tūkstoš gadiem.

answers.B: Es sapratu pasauli un tās uzbūvi
answers.C: Es mīlēju un biju patiesi tuvs cilvēkiem
answers.D: Es biju brīvs, un nekas neierobežoja manu ceļu
answers.E: Es nodzīvoju savu likteni un redzēju dziļu jēgu notiekošajā
